articles.title: 3 reasons for optimism and 3 causes for concern as the Red Sox approach a new season
articles.description:
Roman Anthony is just scratching the surface and could blossom into one of the faces of the sport.

The post 3 reasons for optimism and 3 causes for concern as the Red Sox approach a new season appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Roman Anthony shows potential to become a key player for the Red Sox.
Garrett Crochet's performance will be crucial for the team's pitching depth this season.
Boston fans are hopeful for a competitive season starting March 2026.

articles.title: Kon Knueppel scores 20, Hornets beat Celtics 118-89 to earn 6th straight win
articles.description:
LaMelo Ball and the Hornets moved above .500 with Wednesday's win over the higher- seeded Celtics.

The post Kon Knueppel scores 20, Hornets beat Celtics 118-89 to earn 6th straight win appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Hornets defeated Celtics 118-89 on March 4, marking their sixth consecutive win.
Kon Knueppel scored 20 points, contributing significantly to the Hornets' victory.
Celtics' loss impacts their playoff positioning as they struggle against lower-seeded teams.
